@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class StatisticsServiceImpl

class CombineAllPackage
class CombineAllRecord

class PackageAttributeDaoImpl {
  combineOneDataBase()
}

class DataRecordAttributeDaoImpl {
  combineOneDataBase()
  - statisticsTime()
  - statisticsSize()
}

interface PackageAttributeMapper
interface DataRecordAttributeMapper

CombineAllPackage -|> StatisticsServiceImpl
CombineAllRecord -|> StatisticsServiceImpl

PackageAttributeDaoImpl -|> CombineAllPackage
DataRecordAttributeDaoImpl -|> CombineAllRecord

PackageAttributeMapper -|> PackageAttributeDaoImpl
DataRecordAttributeMapper -|> DataRecordAttributeDaoImpl
@enduml
